heading: Change of place of meeting
label: 27 Change of place of meeting
text: Whenever Congress is about to convene, and from the prevalence of contagious sickness, or the existence of other circumstances, it would, in the opinion of the President, be hazardous to the lives or health of the members to meet at the seat of Government, the President is authorized, by proclamation, to convene Congress at such other place as he may judge proper.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 34 derived from , .act Apr. 3, 1794, ch. 171 Stat. 353
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 34 derived from , .act Apr. 3, 1794, ch. 171 Stat. 353
